textByHashes.5feee5b9f254f04df72bd3b3160855624e027929: Nilsal, my child. Your arrival is well timed.
textByHashes.878a395597d1f4c979399fc59c758093b94c12f9: Yes. The Queen would like to speak with you.
textByHashes.b0f2d20c10de9a0a22f6c3cd8c96651c0b94c93b: Indeed. She is waiting for you upstairs. I will go on ahead and let her know you are here.
textByHashes.c928e0a096903df0079f7e059e77f7150acc6555: With respect, my Queen, were it not for here, I would have died at the hands of the Emissaries. I believe he has earned our trust.
textByHashes.c61e3c5c6254896392ca9b292ebc47da8fe2e68b: With respect, my Queen, were it not for here, I would have died at the hands of the Emissaries. I believe she has earned our trust.
textByHashes.e82c3c6476f07c2984454747e5372134c2c36ce2: With respect, my Queen, were it not for here, I would have died at the hands of the Emissaries. I believe they have earned our trust.
textByHashes.3663deab9a6227493b68f8d28195af6ba8d61485: Then let us give our iknami here the opportunity to regain our trust.
textByHashes.33c2fef321b747556e03c68e2b867f773dd51370: Good luck, my child. May the sun light your way.
textByHashes.088f388c936166abe8f767aeef7a209db1368bd8: Don't take too long. The Queen doesn't like to be kept waiting.
textByHashes.d45a30b8ac5fc31bd1964e9d3c1d27a6beaa9c3a: The Queen is waiting, my child. Let us go and speak with her.
textByHashes.8efbbe4d32a64be0f950a6663d33eadac5ad1f83: Nilsal, my child. I wish you luck at the Twilight Temple.
textByHashes.d6b2774d29d96695e006fa3e7fe23084d3ca6a9f: You have the dedication of a true servant of Ralos. Keep safe, my child.
textByHashes.9534a18b3f290237c761c717160b2dbff15c5747: My blood? Do they wish to trigger the Gathering?
textByHashes.68d3e07fbbf83d27912fcfe6aec3e90117cef73e: Well, there are no houses opposite the eastern bank, so it must be the one looking over the western bank.
textByHashes.08c0278b67b44d2bd693ce52b821d359cbeab8fd: Nilsal, my child. The Queen has given you a job to do. I suggest you get going. Keep safe out there.
textByHashes.13069b7d09fe8ec6587a51bc71ade53723533f2b: It's the ceremony where a dead Teokan is laid to rest and their successor is chosen.
textByHashes.6678ab3b52b2dbd8bd727bdd7e0eb4492053b6c5: We should be weary of trusting the words of a nagua, my Queen.
textByHashes.553fcdf29b0db519845dbbe0c2b1d5a5f6f60d79: The crypt is the most holiest of places, built by the Old Ones themselves. However, the doors were a more recent addition, built by the dwarves. This was before relations soured between us...
textByHashes.cfec32bc986e3fd54421f268803c315f377d960c: Nilsal, my child. We will soon be heading to Cam Torum. You should speak with the Queen if you wish to join us.
textByHashes.672cb51f5d63d98847a52285c89185262318f8db: I will stay as well. It is possible my knowledge will come in useful during the investigation.
textByHashes.6e20605a3a80c4277c38c03532854250e89cb767: The Emissaries hide everywhere. I am no safer at the palace than I am here.
textByHashes.0a2bed9e6116a5a2a3d06ef550325d659213b7b3: You should not waste the Kualti on me.
textByHashes.7fe390d588098bbd431eeea0ab2da3223ffaf0b5: Thank you, my Queen. Come, , let us meet with this dwarf in the market.
textByHashes.349edc84e40460dd5e390646d4fbe5929db52045: Of course not! No human can reach Mokhaiotl!
textByHashes.0875f9b092aec63277ba7cbfff0645362a93f044: Their beliefs are false! They follow the words of a lying heathen!
textByHashes.e6e6c72d6fb2c701e37b7aab0ea8a8d210b8c32d: Nilsal, my child. Perhaps there is something here that can be of use to us. You should have a look around.
textByHashes.688d522d2c0e5fd9ac06762aadc3a4d60ad73e1c: Do not tar us all with the same brush. Most humans would never believe the nonsense those cultists spread.
textByHashes.c860ae56301361e9668eed525bf791b1f44a7413: Nilsal, my child. Perhaps there is something here that can be of use to us. You should have a look around and see what you can find.
textByHashes.a779df769e33cdb9e1f042382040acda604033a6: Nilsal, my child. It looks like you're making progress. Keep at it.
textByHashes.b2884f2c77686cd63187c9ae24a646fdd1049ec9: How do you mean, my child?
textByHashes.080c03f47bb0341613f976c0afedb7f8a47afe24: We are incredibly close, for we are united in Ralos' light, and in the love we share for Itzla. However, it would be fair to say that our relationship is not a conventional one, especially to an outsider.
textByHashes.1cadbec55b66757f23fa28708d8a0c0aed184b7f: In times of old, the ruler of Varlamore would often unite with a Teokan of Ralos. His light guides us in all things, and a King or Queen will need that guidance more than most.
textByHashes.71f482b5b34593ef7d46350df04e5455d1d96540: Before she took the throne, the Queen made the decision to revive that old tradition. I was more than happy to accept.
textByHashes.ea0914d0eb357d206cccb95aed798702281d876f: Do not mention it, my child.
textByHashes.53a89dbf0aa29f83e41bf31ad3986d29dac9f0c9: You're back! Did you find something?
textByHashes.3c5734964f1143b0fcf02c2914f6a33f7b2187c4: Good luck, . May the sun light your way.
textByHashes.c63e7169f4075ee5610df410ab240731308daeb5: The Crypt of Tonali is under attack! The Queen has already gone to help. You should go yourself at once!
textByHashes.ee79046b891be7f4d8949026206ad78d9fbed2e5: The crypt is impossible to miss. It's beneath the large temple south east of here. Go, my child! Go with the strength of Ralos!
textByHashes.6db4b726967d4678f3fc62d57b64b59320a4575e: , you must go to the Crypt of Tonali and help with the defence. It's beneath the large temple south east of here.
textByHashes.7b05439ffee9a6151886ea7aa7248a968be15e7a: Go with the strength of Ralos, my child!
textByHashes.b302f3e251fcfedae0ff0bfc8a1b210ac432c87b: Nilsal, my child. It is good to see you.
textByHashes.0a3f1780ec60565d3209c2540050fa1ccaea3f81: Well, it is relieving to know that my life is no longer in danger, but there is no shortage of work to be done.
textByHashes.8a69aa4ca8c639f2b03fa94cd0a6a726872707cf: The Sect of Ranul are planning a special Gathering to select their new Teokan, and we in the Church of Ralos have an important part to play. There is a lot to prepare.
textByHashes.8f919be922c938c4b7120544422a394f96371681: Indeed. For a start, the doors within the crypt seem to be beyond repair, meaning the ceremony will need some substantial changes.
textByHashes.dc8f37c452323da892686a05102f6add8cda1d8b: It does also mean that anyone can now access the caverns below, which reminds me, Itzla told me what you found down there.
textByHashes.b461cc9c04ae65a7fa7d58fbdf9180812bdb6c64: Well, I'd be careful of making assumptions, my child. Itzla said the ruins were meant to be an archive. A centre point for all the knowledge of the Old Ones.
textByHashes.acc5b57aace8cc762ff58e676ce2f37a3e2a007a: I'd say it makes perfect sense that they'd choose to name a place like that after Mokhaiotl.
textByHashes.2e8f632649e61a35298026668ab01fc9c78e84ef: Well, being the Teokan of Ralos, I do have the odd moment of wisdom from time to time. Now, I must get back to my work. Timoiva, my child, and may the sun light your way.
textByHashes.f46752ced5ef9b4a22fc0d11a7a793b307a2539b: Ah, nilsal, my child. It is good to see you.
textByHashes.8ed11530e77abc1e9dc84aa7f8dda101973a78cb: Ralos still has need of me, my child. I will not bow down to a mere knife wound.
textByHashes.08de4d999268b9518facebeb0f4ae269ad75bb50: Blasphemy and betrayal in equal measure! They will all burn in the light of Ralos for this! And you say they have captured the Prince as well?
textByHashes.1cd77cc4120f8141bf15a731f5b48ad7447adb53: This is dire news. I must speak to the Queen at once. Is there anything else I should be aware of before doing so?
textByHashes.ce33a1ce84e9acc17655e268cc46bec015f0156d: Mokhaiotl is not a place that can be reached! These fools are truly lost!
textByHashes.a83dfde590370ba73b706620e2751bdbee9b127d: You should be careful of trusting the words of a nagua. Still, I must seek the guidance of Ralos on this matter. First though, I will speak with the Queen.
textByHashes.3cc632328e2038264bec09946995aa6c4bb6da98: I would suggest you make yourself scarce. The Queen will not take kindly to this development. I would hate for you to face her fire, my child.
textByHashes.a2f5b3917a5dfedc3567cb9a0e86115a6bbc0a69: And help you will. I will ensure you are involved in whatever plans are made for dealing with this cult, but for now, you should leave this to me.
textByHashes.15fc66812c8fb665753c6b61d14cc3a65a604056: Timoiva, my child, and may the sun light your way.
textByHashes.8c4c59f1b88af956553bae089b91ee59ed136138: Nilsal, my child. It is an honour to meet you. Were it not for you, I may well already be making my journey to Mictl. On behalf of both myself and Ralos, I thank you.
textByHashes.15c5e3e2d141cb113b1e75d8df29fb6c4d0b9c94: Metzli and her sect play an essential role in our lives. You should not judge her so harshly.
textByHashes.a1c3b8aad176dda7cfb109eed2e8e86ec12380ee: I'd like to think I'd have done a better job if I had.
textByHashes.1d7dcbee295d9774d1241ba25b6345f710091ffb: Ennius and Furia are loyal children of Ralos. They would not wish to see my death.
textByHashes.e3b99c93b37e2f45f7ec0f78478e12d24cedf243: Nonsense! I am the Teokan of Ralos and I have a duty to the people. I must return to the Teomat at once!
textByHashes.3d37632bd69138b54758b07c8812840a17141a44: I am the chosen messenger of Ralos. He would not have me cower and hide. I will return to the Teomat.
textByHashes.fe6ba9ff9c49bffb561f2a5cfd19d2cb87310b65: My child, I would be delighted to have you as a travelling companion.
textByHashes.e479a87a249afc47f6da6508a4648ed9870688ba: The Tullus family have loyally served the rulers of Varlamore since the death of Emperor Imafore. For one of them to be a traitor is unthinkable!
textByHashes.f564c63571650befb63c875be36f84bb5a64a9f5: Imafore's death was over a hundred years ago! His family had no love for him then, and they've loyally served the Arkans since.
textByHashes.5f184253acc570a9636f6aa8da1fb2286608c59f: Nothing more than blasphemy! It is not something we should waste our time talking about.
textByHashes.02dcbd61f977a512a11bdbee33ddddcca45d34ee: It's not something I care to know about, but if anyone around here were to know, it would be Metzli.
textByHashes.8f53086d421ea67b44c92a00dbc6d4b3d127e06a: The Sect of Ranul are responsible for maintaining the library here. That includes dealing with any forbidden materials.
textByHashes.0f525cbf574757b2fd658e31aab43906ac193257: Nilsal, my child. I imagine you're hoping for word on our plans for rescuing Itzla. I'm afraid nothing has been decided yet, but once that changes, I am sure you will have a part to play.
textByHashes.f08a89b4813b967238e2849e414ec6150b251997: Do not lose heart, my child. May the sun light your way.
